description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has four jobs: linux64, cppcheck, win64_msys2, and win32_msvc. The linux64 job builds the project on ubuntu-latest with different compilers, cppcheck runs static analysis, win64_msys2 builds on windows-latest with MSYS2, and win32_msvc builds on windows-2019 with MSVC.
